$comment: ★ ★ ★ ★ PoC #09 SQL Inventory (★ paradigm + platform-cross corroboration #2 / Modern Node.js stack — TypeScript + NestJS + TypeORM). 외부 6 + 본 추가 5 = 11 컬럼. ★ ★ paradigm-cross MEDIUM #2 (★ strong 솔직 인정 부재 — pure raw query() 부재 / createQueryBuilder fluent API 만). 24 entry = 3 createQueryBuilder direct + 21 ORM repository logical inference.
spectrum: NestJS 5 + TypeORM 0.2 + TypeScript ES2017 + MySQL / Modern Node.js / 4 BC clean / blog domain (Realworld Conduit)
corroboration_role: ★ ★ paradigm + platform-cross corroboration #2 — PoC #06 (Spring 4.1 + iBATIS 2 / 단일) + PoC #07 (Spring 4.1 + iBATIS 2 / 다중) + PoC #08 (Spring 6 + MyBatis 3 / Modern Java) ≥ 3 PoC isomorphic 후 ★ paradigm + platform 진입 (Java→TS / JVM→Node.js / XML→inline TS fluent API). ★ MEDIUM 자격 = createQueryBuilder fluent API paradigm 입증 / ★ ★ raw query() 입증 ❌ 솔직 (pure realworld OSS 희소).

applied_penalties.name: orm_abstraction_logical_inference
applied_penalties.reason: ★ ★ TypeORM repository ORM 추상화 21건 = logical SQL 추론 (★ direct SQL 부재 / find/save/etc 자동 SQL 생성)

warnings: ★ ★ ★ pure raw query() 명시 사용 ❌ — createQueryBuilder fluent API 3건만 / strong corroboration 자격 ❌ 솔직
★ ORM 추상화 21건 = logical SQL 추론 (★ TypeORM 자동 SQL 생성 / direct grep ❌)
★ statement_type = 모두 PREPARED (parameterized) / CALLABLE = stored procedure 부재
